title: spathodea campanulata subsp. campanulata
intro: Spathodea campanulata subsp. campanulata, also known as the African tulip tree, is a plant species that belongs to the family Bignoniaceae and is native to tropical Africa. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include antimicrobial, anti-inflammatory, and antimalarial activities. The health benefits of Spathodea campanulata subsp. campanulata include the treatment of fever, cough, and respiratory issues, as well as the relief of pain and inflammation. The plant can be prepared as a tea or infusion, and its leaves and flowers are used in herbal remedies.
